description_long: This object is a large, dark stone statue partially enveloped by lush green ivy vines, giving it a weathered and natural appearance. The statue appears to depict a seated figure, possibly of cultural or religious significance, with intricate details partially obscured by the dense foliage. Bright red flowers are scattered at the base, adding a vivid contrast to the otherwise muted tones of the stone and greenery. The ivy climbs up one side of the statue, cascading over the shoulders and down the back, suggesting it has been outdoors for some time. The stone surface is rough and matte, with visible textural variations and signs of age. The overall impression is of a decorative, monumental potted plant feature suitable for a park or garden setting.
description: A large, dark stone statue covered in green ivy vines and accented with red flowers, giving it a natural, aged look. The foliage partially obscures the detailed figure, creating a striking contrast between the stone and plant life.
description_view_0: The back and side of the statue are visible, with dense ivy covering much of the surface and red flowers at the base.
description_view_1: A narrow side profile dominated by cascading ivy, with the stone form mostly hidden beneath the foliage.
description_view_2: The front of the statue is shown, with the figure's features partially visible and a thick layer of ivy draping over one side.
description_view_3: Another side view, highlighting the vertical growth of the ivy and the cluster of red flowers at the statue's base.
